query:
INSERT INTO context_files (
                context_id,
                file_id,
                pipeline_id,
                origin,
                original_name,
                original_path,
                media_type
            )
            VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4::file_origin, $5, $6, $7)
            ON CONFLICT (context_id, file_id) DO NOTHING
            RETURNING id
